text:
EXPLANATION: The cited title "factual and graphical approaches to causality" is an incomplete/truncated version of the real paper "Single World Intervention Graphs (SWIGs): A Unification of the Counterfactual and Graphical Approaches to Causality" by T.S. Richardson and J.M. Robins (2013), Working Paper 128, Center for Statistics and the Social Sciences, University of Washington. The title and venue match perfectly once the truncation is accounted for, and authors were omitted in the citation but the real authors are Richardson & Robins.

LINK: https://www.mdpi.com/1099-4300/28/4/405
FOUND_TITLE: Single World Intervention Graphs (SWIGs): A Unification of the Counterfactual and Graphical Approaches to Causality
FOUND_AUTHORS: T.S. Richardson, J.M. Robins
FOUND_YEAR: 2013
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
